sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9746" key="a)nteuxaristhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντευ-χαριστητέον</orth>, <sense id="n9746.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must give thanks in turn,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
